use_cases: AI chat interfaces requiring user prompt input with credit tracking
SaaS platforms offering AI-powered features with usage limits
AI assistant applications with interactive tool selection (voice, magic, attachments)
Creative tools needing dismissible credit banners and engaging animations
Mobile and desktop AI prompt composition interfaces
ai_summary: A gradient-border chat input component designed for AI prompt interfaces with dismissible credit banners, interactive tool buttons (mic, magic, attachment), and smooth framer-motion animations. Features two variants (default and magic) with vibrant gradient styling. Ideal for SaaS AI tools, creator platforms, and dev-tools requiring elegant user input with usage tracking and upgrade prompts.
